title: Onboarding - Eula page - check page UI
scenario: EULA page header, description, and instructions text display correctly during first-time app launch onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time after installation.
2. Observe the Onboarding screen that appears.
3. Verify the EULA (End User License Agreement) page is displayed.
4. Check the header text on the EULA page.
5. Check the description text on the EULA page.
6. Check the instructions text on the EULA page.
expected: The EULA page displays correctly with a proper header (e.g., "End User License Agreement"), a clear description of the agreement terms, and instructions for the user (e.g., scroll to read, accept/decline options). All text is readable, properly formatted, and free of truncation or alignment issues.
